_readme: Copy this file to profile.json and fill in YOUR real data. profile.json is git-ignored and never leaves your machine. It is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — the agent never invents facts that are not here.
headline: Your Title | Main Skills
summary: 2-4 sentence professional summary. Only true, verifiable facts — the agent uses this to write free-text answers.

projects.name: Project Name
projects.description: What it is and what you built.

legal_authorization._note: Sponsorship depends on WHERE THE WORK IS PERFORMED, not where the company is. Job in your country, or remote role worked from your country → authorized: Yes, sponsorship: No. Role requiring relocation/onsite presence in another country → authorized there: No, sponsorship: Yes. Posting ambiguous about remote eligibility from your country → STOP and ask the user. Never claim authorization anywhere except the listed countries.

work_preferences._note: Set these honestly; the agent answers work-mode questions from here.

salary_expectation._note: Numeric fields: read the label for period and currency — monthly vs annual, currency conversion. Other currency or unclear period → STOP and ask the user. Optional or free-text field → prefer 'Negotiable'.

self_identification._note: For voluntary EEO/demographic questions (gender, ethnicity, disability, veteran status): always select 'I don't wish to answer' / 'Decline to self-identify' unless the user explicitly says otherwise.

form_defaults.how_did_you_hear_about_us: Only claim a source that is actually true for this posting; unknown → ask the user (one word); otherwise pick the truthful closest option ('Job board'/'Other')
form_defaults.consent_checkboxes: Required privacy-policy/data-processing consent → check; optional marketing/talent-pool retention → leave unchecked and mention in handover report
form_defaults._background_check_note: Never answer background-check or criminal-record questions without asking the user.
